heading: Additional Resources
body:
- [Atlas Examples repository](https://github.com/terraform-mongodbatlas-modules/atlas-examples):
  Complete, runnable Terraform examples for AWS (Amazon Web Services), Azure (Microsoft Azure), and Google Cloud.

- [Terraform-MongoDB Atlas Modules](https://registry.terraform.io/namespaces/terraform-mongodbatlas-modules):
  The official Terraform module registry namespace with all available modules.

- [Atlas Terraform Provider](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/mongodb/mongodbatlas/latest/docs):
  Full provider documentation.

- [Get Started with Terraform](getting-started-terraform): A quickstart
  guide for provisioning a basic Atlas cluster with Terraform.

- [Guidance for Atlas Organizations, Projects, and Clusters](atlas/architecture/current/automation):
  Atlas Architecture Center guidance to design your Atlas infrastructure.
